mapper.select:
SELECT g.id AS id, g.title AS title, g.is_completed AS isCompleted, g.completed_time AS completedTime, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT n.id), 0) AS nodeCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS taskCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ts.is_terminal = 1 THEN t.id END), 0) AS completedCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS totalCount, g.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_goal g LEFT JOIN mobe_node n ON n.user_id = g.user_id AND n.owner_type = 'GOAL' AND n.owner_id = g.id AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_item t ON t.user_id = g.user_id AND ( (t.direct_owner_type = 'GOAL' AND t.direct_owner_id = g.id) OR (t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND t.direct_owner_id = n.id) ) AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_status ts ON ts.id = t.current_status_id AND ts.is_deleted = 0 WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} AND g.is_deleted = 0
AND g.is_completed = 0
AND g.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY g.id, g.title, g.is_completed, g.completed_time, g.update_time ORDER BY g.is_completed ASC, g.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mobe_goal g WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} AND g.is_deleted = 0
AND g.is_completed = 0
AND g.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT g.id AS id, g.title AS title, g.content AS content, g.remark AS remark, g.execution_mode AS executionMode, g.status_template_id AS statusTemplateId, g.is_completed AS isCompleted, g.completed_time AS completedTime, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT n.id), 0) AS nodeCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS taskCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ts.is_terminal = 1 THEN t.id END), 0) AS completedCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS totalCount, g.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_goal g LEFT JOIN mobe_node n ON n.user_id = g.user_id AND n.owner_type = 'GOAL' AND n.owner_id = g.id AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_item t ON t.user_id = g.user_id AND ( (t.direct_owner_type = 'GOAL' AND t.direct_owner_id = g.id) OR (t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND t.direct_owner_id = n.id) ) AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_status ts ON ts.id = t.current_status_id AND ts.is_deleted = 0 WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.user_id = #{userId} AND g.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY g.id, g.title, g.content, g.remark, g.execution_mode, g.status_template_id, g.is_completed, g.completed_time, g.update_time
